productDisplayName: Redtape Men Stone Wall Blue Casual Shoes
description: Cut a dash with these casual shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in cool sophisticated blue, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual open neck shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Stitch detailing for extra style Lace-ups for snug Fit Textile lined collar and tongue for greater comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole PU midsole for lightwieght comfort Outsole PU outsole with circular lugs for grip shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
